name: Claude 3 Haiku
tagline: Fastest model of the original Claude 3 family; deprecated, retiring 2026-04-19.
metaDescription: Claude 3 Haiku (Anthropic), released 2024-03-13 — part of the Claude Haiku line. Fastest model of the original Claude 3 family; deprecated, retiring 2026-04-19.
overview: Claude 3 Haiku is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Haiku line. Released 2024-03-13. Anthropic's fastest and most cost-effective Claude tier, for high-volume and latency-sensitive tasks.
What's notable in this version: Fastest model of the original Claude 3 family; deprecated, retiring 2026-04-19.
